## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-driven content creation and SEO services for SPS Commerce's potential website migration and optimization project.](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX specializes in AI-powered content creation and SEO/GEO strategy, not website migration](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [SPS Commerce is merging three companies/websites, with migration as the immediate priority](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a two-phase approach: strategy sprint followed by growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [GrowthX provides comprehensive analytics and LLM visibility tracking for created content](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

## Topics

### SPS Commerce's Current Situation and Needs

  - [Merging three companies and their respective websites](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Primary focus on website migration, followed by SEO/AEO audit](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Uncertain about long-term content creation needs due to ongoing reorganization](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Looking for analysis, direction, and optimization of existing content](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

### GrowthX's Capabilities and Approach

  - [Two-phase process: strategy sprint (phase 1) and growth execution (phase 2)](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Utilizes AI for content creation while maintaining human expertise oversight](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Offers daily publishing against a collaboratively developed content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Provides analytics and LLM visibility tracking for created content](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Uses internal platform for workflow management, soon to be accessible by clients](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Conducts technical audits and makes recommendations for improved visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI-driven research and fact-checking processes](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Creates persona artifacts to inform content relevance](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Develops assignments based on keyword opportunities and difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Implements multi-step content creation workflow with quality checks](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### Case Studies and Examples

  - [Showed success stories for clients like Monograph, Engine, Town, Augment Code, Tiro, and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Demonstrated significant traffic increases (e.g., 2.5x for Augment Code, 10x for Tiro)](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Showcased ability to create interactive tools and programmatic content (e.g., Ramp's per diem calculator)](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Hallie to discuss with Maria (CMO) about GrowthX's capabilities and fit](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Confirm if SPS Commerce is looking for both strategy and execution partner](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [GrowthX to potentially submit a modified RFP response by October 6th, focusing on relevant offerings](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Tyler to follow up with additional information and meeting recording](https://fathom.video/share/xEjvCw-YTmXdFcLUiQeyEjHxaRzLjXyp?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
